name: rtk-hook
description: Codex plugin that applies RTK shell command prefix guidance through a PreToolUse hook.

interface.shortDescription: Blocks shell commands that are not prefixed with rtk.
interface.longDescription: Ports Ghost233/rtk-hook into this marketplace. The hook reads rules.json and returns a Codex PreToolUse deny decision with a retry suggestion when a shell command is not already routed through rtk.
defaultPrompt: Use the RTK hook rules for shell commands.
